document_metadata.source_document: Telangana Transport Department - GO Ms No 26

special_notices.orr_lane_discipline: Strict lane discipline on ORR. Heavy vehicles must stay in the left lanes. 120kmph limit verified.
special_notices.cyberabad_it_belt: Zero tolerance for wrong-side driving and signal jumping in IT hubs.

violations.plain_english_summary: Compounding fee for riding without a helmet in Telangana. Verified for Hyderabad and Warangal city limits.
extraction_notes: TS has significantly lower compounding fees for basic helmet violations to encourage compliance without high friction.

violations.plain_english_summary: Penalties for jumping signals and dangerous maneuvers in Telangana cities.
extraction_notes: Integrated with TS Police 'ITMS' (Intelligent Traffic Management System) in Karimnagar and Khammam.
